{{Quote|This man is a smuggler! He has gold on his fifth and sixth ribs!|Smalyun|<ref name="marvel48" />}}
'''Smalyun''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] in the [[Bank of Aargau/Legends|Bank of Aargau]] [[Bank of Aargau Security, Ltd.|Security's]] customs division during the era of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Inexperienced at his post as a [[Security officer/Legends|security officer]] at [[Planetary Customs Security Checkpoint LH48]] as of [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], Smalyun struggled with lateness early in his new role, but impressed supervisors by mastering the checkpoint's [[BAS44 Customs-Grade Holoscanner|holoscanner]] in record time.<ref name="aargau2">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20030814aargau2|series=Aargau: For All Your Banking Needs|text=Part 2: Secure Lines of Credit}}</ref>

Smalyun was secretly a contact of notorious [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Li-Suun Niik]], and not long after his new posting he overlooked one of Niik's men attempting to pass through the scanner with illegal [[Gold/Legends|gold]] bonded to two of his [[Bone/Legends|ribs]]. [[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant-at-Arms]] [[Rolex]] informed Smalyun of his "error," and Smalyun responded by killing the man without hesitation.<ref name="aargau3">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20030821aargau3|series=Aargau: For All Your Banking Needs|text=Part 3: Now 99% Crime Free}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Smalyun first appeared in [[Star Wars (1977) 48|''Star Wars'' (1977) 48]], written by [[Larry Hama]] and released in [[1981]]. In the comic, Smalyun was illustrated by [[Carmine Infantino]].<ref name="marvel48">[[Star Wars (1977) 48|''Star Wars'' (1977) 48]]</ref> Although he goes unnamed in his initial appearance, he was finally named in the [[2003]] [[Wizards of the Coast]] article ''[[Aargau: For All Your Banking Needs]]''.<ref name="aargau3" />
